details: The agent successfully navigated to github.com/torvalds/linux and then to the MAINTAINERS file (both via GitHub UI and raw content). The agent correctly read the file and identified the first maintainer listed alphabetically: Steffen Klassert (klassert@kernel.org) under the 3C59X NETWORK DRIVER section. The known fact about Linus Torvalds being 'at the top' is misleading — the MAINTAINERS file lists entries alphabetically, and the first actual maintainer entry is indeed Steffen Klassert. The agent navigated correctly and accurately reported what the file contains.
